title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Angel One in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
